concerns.text: Task T007 implements 'forgetting/decay mechanism' but spec.md contains no definition of this feature. Implementer cannot execute deterministically without spec requirements for decay rate, trigger conditions, or retention policy.

Task T008 implements 'memory consolidation mechanism (CREB-mediated transcription)' but spec.md contains no definition of this feature. Implementer cannot execute deterministically without spec requirements for consolidation triggers, storage format, or persistence policy.

Task T015 implements 'precise cue-driven retrieval validation logic' but spec.md contains no definition of this validation logic. Implementer cannot execute deterministically without spec requirements for validation criteria, thresholds, or output format.

Task T030 references FR-010 (error logging) for power-law fitting implementation, but FR-010 is unrelated. Should reference FR-004 (specialization index) or US-3. Traceability error may confuse implementer.

Task T033 logs 'computational cost per agent count' but this metric is not defined in spec.md or Constitution Principle VI. Implementer cannot execute deterministically without spec requirements for cost measurement methodology or output format.

Task T034 documents 'forgetting mechanism and consolidation logic' but spec.md contains no definition of these features. Implementer cannot execute deterministically without spec requirements for what to document.

Task T037 tests 'noise logging and confidence metrics' but spec.md contains no definition of these metrics. Implementer cannot execute deterministically without spec requirements for noise/confidence measurement methodology.
